name: Chocolate Berry Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 package (14 oz.) marble pound cake, cut into 1/4-inch slices
2 packages JELL-O Chocolate Instant Pudding Mix
2 cups raspberries or strawberries, hulled and halved
2 squares BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Baking Chocolate, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9-inch square pan with cake slices.
2. In a large bowl, combine milk and pudding mixes. Beat with a wire whisk for 1 minute until thickened.
3. Stir in the Cool Whip and spread over the cake slices.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours until set.
5. Just before serving, top with raspberries and drizzle with melted chocolate.
6. Store leftover dessert in the refrigerator.
